text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 16 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287

平和の君なる　御子を迎え
